AIMP Config

Wine-based music player, library aligned with the rip script.

PLANTED · 15 OCTOBER 2025 · ZETTEL NOTE

Music player config (Wine-based). Library points at organized rip tree from rip_playlist.py workflow.

Files

AIMP/.config/AIMP/ — settings, skins, playlist state

Library convention

{albumartist} - {title} ({year}) — set in player options to match rip script output.

  • System Config MOC
